close_reason: Investigation complete: Root cause identified as repeated nix develop calls (~13-15s each). Created implementation tasks for optimization.
description:
E2E tests are taking 150-220+ seconds each. Need to investigate:

1. Are Nix builds being cached properly between tests?
2. Can we share devenv derivations across test runs?
3. Should we pre-build common derivations before running tests?
4. Profile where time is spent: nix eval, nix build, buck2 build?

Current timings observed:
- brownfield-adoption: 207s
- ci-headless: 158s
- error-recovery: 215s

Each test creates an isolated project with its own flake.nix which may cause full Nix evaluations.
title: Investigate e2e test performance and Nix caching
